pageContext.name: Peter Pan and Wendy Darling
pageContext.description: The Disney Showcase Collection by Enesco combines the magic of Disney collectibles with beautifully sculpted resin art. Off to the second star on the right and straight on until morning, Peter sweeps Wendy Darling off her feet as they fly off to Neverland!  Be sure to add this Peter Pan figurine to your Disney collection today!
